title: Oxford Cable Bike Lock
features: Complete with three keys and two quick release brackets
description: Product Description 1.8m long Oxford Cable Lock constructed from 12mm self coiling high tensile steel. Comes with protective vinyl sleeve, three keys and two quick release brackets for transportation when not in use. Available in a range of colours to suit bike styles, add this cable lock to your security kit to deter opportunist thief's. Oxford Products Ltd (OXFORD) is a global leader in bicycle and motorcycle products. Established in 1973 the OXFORD range of products encompasses everything which makes life on bikes better: from clothing and helmets to accessories, hard parts, locks and luggage and more! Box Contains 1 x OF247 Lock
